diagrams.title: File Allocation Methods Comparison
diagrams.description: Shows three allocation methods side by side with their block organization
elements: Shows external fragmentation in contiguous, pointer chaining in linked, index structure in indexed
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how files are stored on disk under different allocation strategies

diagrams.title: Inode Structure
diagrams.description: Complete inode data structure showing all fields and pointers
elements: Each pointer gives address of one data block
diagrams.purpose: Understand file metadata storage and how file data blocks are accessed

diagrams.title: File Open Operation Flow
diagrams.description: Step by step process from system call to file access
elements: 6. Create entry in open file table
diagrams.purpose: Trace the kernel operations during file opening to understand system call processing
